calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Final Distribution
Off Calendar Nov-08-2021 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Final Distribution
Off Calendar Oct-18-2021 Continued To Nov-08-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Final Distribution
Off Calendar Sep-27-2021 Continued To Oct-18-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Final Distribution
Off Calendar Aug-30-2021 Continued To Sep-27-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Ronak Patek, via ZOOM, for Jill Willard, Personal Representative.

Counsel begins by advising the court that his client could not attend today's hearing due to a conflict but that he expects her appearance at the next calling of this matter. The court then confirms with counsel that he has emailed copies of the bank statements to the assigned Examiner. The court also confirms with counsel the filing of a waiver of accounting and proof of service. Counsel then advises that he intends to file an amended accounting petition soon. The court recommends that counsel file a supplement to the existing petition instead.

After additional discussion, the accounting petition is continued to 9/27/2021 at 9:00 am in in Department 204.

Judge: Hon. Vedica Puri. Examiner: Sandy Hilton. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: R. Loo. Not reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jul-26-2021 Continued To Aug-30-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Ronak Patel, via ZOOM, for Jill Willard, Personal Representative.

The court begins by asking counsel if he has seen the most recent Examiner's notes. Counsel confirms that he has and reports that he filed an Inventory and Appraisal last week. The court then queries counsel regarding why the cash and cars that have been ordered transferred to the estate were excluded from the most recent Inventory and Appraisal. Counsel reports that payment has been received in the form of a check and that the cars had been appraised with no value. Counsel reports that the preceding will be included in a subsequent Inventory and Appraisal. The court directs counsel to address all the issues raised by the Examiner prior to the next calling of this matter.

The Petition for Final Distribution is continued to August 30, 2021, at 9:00 am in Department 204.

Judge: Hon. Ross Moody. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: R. Loo. Not reported.

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jun-28-2021 Continued To Jul-26-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Off Calendar Mar-29-2021 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Final Distribution
Off Calendar Mar-22-2021 Continued To Apr-19-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of The Estate
Off Calendar Dec-21-2020 Continued To Mar-29-21 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jim Burns, Esq., counsel for Jill Willard, Executor (appearing by telephone).

At the Court's query, Mr. Burns reports that the Inventory and Appraisal was filed on December 18, 2020. After further discussion, the Court continues the matter to March 29, 2021 at 9:00 a.m.by which time the Final Account and Petition for Final Distribution must be on file. If the accounting and petition are on file one week prior to March 29th, no appearance will be required and the matter will be taken off calendar.

Judge: Hon. Ross C. Moody; Clerk: R. Michael Diles; Bailiff: Deputy Rosado. Reporter: Not Reported. (D204)
